# Acme Coffee

> Acme is a Brooklyn-based coffee roaster shipping single-origin beans nationwide.

## Beans

- [Single-origin lineup](https://acme.coffee/beans): catalog of current offerings
- [Roast profiles](https://acme.coffee/roast-profiles): how we roast each origin

## Brewing

- [Pour-over guide](https://acme.coffee/brew/pour-over)
- [Espresso guide](https://acme.coffee/brew/espresso)

## Optional

- [Full corpus](https://acme.coffee/llms-full.txt): everything above plus historical posts and tasting notes
